title: Create Explorators
description: A modpack When Create and exploration are built Together
body:
![C](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59039ec98ddb2eed9fbf5426c105a3e2987f8c49.png) 

Welcome to my my Modpack where the exploration and Create are built together (with some teck)... 




The essensials of the modpack are :
- Create & a lot of addons they are on fabric
- Biomes mods like Region unexplored, Oh The Biomes We've Gone...
- Generation mods like Continets, Terralith & Terratonic...
- All the YUNG'S
- Duengeon Now Loading (Remember 1.5%)
- Teck mod like Hephaestus & Botania
- And much more...

--------------------------------------------------------------------
This is Probably the Ultimate Create and Exploration Modpack
Shoutout to the creators of the mods and texture pack like :
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

Don't forget to check the others modders without them you cannot play minecrat like today

(News 10/18/24 : Sea fish causes lot of lag and kill evry mob you can see for reducing the lag)

(News 10/23/24 : Allocate at least 6GB for the modpack. Tutorial For the Official launcher here : [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QdzOpplQ2EE&t=119s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QdzOpplQ2EE&t=119s)) 

(News 12/13/2024 WE HIT 100 DOWNOLADS GG !!!)
